calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-12-2024 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for appeal of Labor Commissioners judgment against Appellants Saffron Brewhouse LLC and Appellant Prem Makkena.

Dept: 505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 9:28:17 a.m., pausing at 9:48:31 a.m., resuming at 9:48:46 a.m., pausing at 9:54:14 a.m., resuming at 10:12:06 a.m. and concluding at 10:25:32a.m.(D505)

Arkady Itkin, Esq. representing Appellant Saffron Brewhouse LLC and Appellant Prem Makkena.
Appellant Prem Makkena was placed under oath and testified.
Respondent Malay Oza not appearing.
Edward Novak appeared by phone call, was sworn to testify for the appellants.

Notice of appeal filed by appellant Saffron Brewhouse and Prem Mekkena on Oct-28-2022.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial filed and sent on Nov-02-2023.
Proof of service by Mail as to Respondent Malay Oza filed on Apr-04-2024.

Counsel to offer proof as to the issues of proof of service of the documents filed as an appeal and the address where the Respondent was served.
The matter of proof of service is discussed.
The Court inquires if Counsel has a motion to present to the Court.
Edward Novak is called to testify via phone call.
The Clerk administers the witness oath to Edward Novak.
The witness is examined by the Court.
Counsel requesting for a break to confer with his clients and witness.

The Court takes a brief recess.
Back on the Record. All parties are present.

Edward Novak is recalled to testify via phone call.
Witness confirms that the mailing originating location is Millbrae, CA and witness is a resident of San Mateo County.
Court examines Appellant as to the address of the Respondent.

The proof of service was perfected in Court, the server, Mr. Novak, testifies under penalty of perjury that the endorsed filed appeal documents were mailed from Millbrae, CA. No new address provided for Respondents. Efforts by the appellant was made via phone call and electronic mail to the Respondent.

Counsel orally moves the Court for dismissal of the action in favor of the appellant.

Good cause appearing, The Court grants appellants motion to dismiss by default without prejudice in favor of the Appellant Saffron Brewhouse LLC and Appellant Prem Makkena.

Proposed judgment to be submitted by counsel for review and approval of the Court.

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-13-2024 Continued To Apr-12-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-11-2024 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-11-2024 Continued To Mar-13-24 At 08:00 A.M. In Dept 505
